findings.title: Fully verified authority baseline
findings.detail: All currently attached authority support is marked as verified_quote.

findings.title: Mixed authority support
findings.detail: This case mixes 3 verified quotes with 2 paraphrase supports, so downstream consumers should distinguish direct support from fallback grounding.

findings.title: Paraphrase-heavy authority support
findings.detail: This case uses 3 paraphrase supports and 2 verified quotes, so advocacy and memorandum outputs should be presented as lower-trust authority grounding.

findings.title: Mixed authority support
findings.detail: This case mixes 4 verified quotes with 1 paraphrase supports, so downstream consumers should distinguish direct support from fallback grounding.
